%% Procedure to obtain "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact
flowchart TD
    A["Check Event Availability for \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\" (-> Genshin Impact event)"] --> B["Participate in the Event Quests"]
    B --> C["Unlock the Recipe for \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\""]
    C --> |"recipe for \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\""| D["Learn the Recipe"]
    D --> |"learned recipe for \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\""| E["Gather Ingredients"]
    E --> |"Tea Leaves, Sugar, Lotus Head, Milk"| F["Cook the Dish \"Fine Tea, Full Moon\""]

%% Procedure to reach the Nether in Minecraft flowchart TD A["Step 1: Gather Basic Resources
- Wood
- Crafting table
- Wooden pickaxe"] -->|"wood, crafting table, wooden pickaxe"| B["Step 2: Mine for Stone and Iron
- 17 cobblestones
- At least 3 iron ores"] B -->|"cobblestone (-> 17), iron ore (-> at least 3)"| C["Step 3: Smelt Iron
- Craft furnace
- Smelt iron ore into at least 3 iron ingots"] C -->|"iron ingots (-> at least 3)"| D["Step 4: Collect Water and Lava
- Craft a bucket
- Fill bucket with water
- Locate lava source pool"] D -->|"water bucket, lava source pool"| E["Step 5: Create Obsidian
- Pour water over lava source blocks to form obsidian
- Note: alternative to mining obsidian with diamond pickaxe"] E -->|"obsidian (formed from water over lava source)"| F["Step 6: Build Nether Portal without Mining Obsidian
- Shape: 10 obsidian blocks (corners optional)
- Use mold technique with dirt/other blocks
- Place lava, then water to form obsidian frame"] F -->|"Nether Portal frame (-> obsidian frame)"| G["Step 7: Activate the Nether Portal
- Obtain flint (from gravel)
- Use remaining iron ingot to craft flint and steel
- Ignite bottom obsidian block"] G -->|"activated Nether Portal"| I["Entering the Nether
- Stand in the activated portal to be transported to the Nether"] %% Optional branch: mining obsidian directly C -->|"iron pickaxe prerequisite for diamond mining (implied from iron ingots)"| H["Optional: Use a Diamond Pickaxe
- Mine diamonds deep underground near lava pools (Y 5–16)
- Craft diamond pickaxe
- Mine obsidian directly for portal frame"] H -->|"mined obsidian blocks"| F

%% Procedure to achieve Sharpness +1 in Monster Hunter Generations (-> Monster Hunter X, MHX)
flowchart TD
    A["Select Armor Sets with Handicraft points (e.g., Nargacuga, Seregios, Silver Sol)"] -->|"Armor pieces with Handicraft points"| B["Mix and Match Armor Pieces to reach Handicraft +10"]
    B -->|"Combined Handicraft from armor pieces"| C["Add Decorations (Gems) with Handicraft at the Smithy"]
    C -->|"Armor + Decorations (Gems) with Handicraft points"| D["Use Charms (Talismans) with Handicraft"]
    D -->|"Total Handicraft points from armor, decorations, and charms"| E["Check Skills on Status Screen"]
    E -->|"Handicraft +10 (-> Sharpness +1)"| F["Activate Sharpness +1"]
    F --> G["Apply Advanced Tips: unlock higher-rank quests and hunt more monsters for materials"]

%% Procedure to create Lingering Potions of Harming II in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Spider Eye, Fermented Spider Eye, Glowstone Dust, Gunpowder, Dragon’s Breath, Brewing Stand"] -->|"Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Brewing Stand"| B["Brew Awkward Potions"]
    B -->|"Awkward Potions"| C["Brew Potions of Harming I"]
    C -->|"Potions of Harming I (Instant Damage I)"| D["Upgrade to Harming II"]
    D -->|"Potions of Harming II (Instant Damage II)"| E["Make Splash Potions of Harming II"]
    E -->|"Splash Potions of Harming II"| F["Make Lingering Potions of Harming II"]

    %% Optional intermediate note about Spider Eye (-> Poison/Healing)
    C_note["(Optional) Use Spider Eye (-> Spider Eye) first for Poison, then convert with Fermented Spider Eye (-> Fermented Spider Eye) to Harming I"]
    B -. "Awkward Potions" .-> C_note

%% Procedure to obtain the Titanium Sword in Terraria
flowchart TD
    A["Defeat the Wall of Flesh"] -->|"Hardmode, Pwnhammer (dropped by Wall of Flesh)"| B["Break Demon/Crimson Altars"]
    B -->|"3+ Altars broken → Titanium Ore can spawn"| C["Mine Titanium Ore"]
    C -->|"Titanium Ore"| D["Smelt Titanium Bars"]
    D -->|"Titanium Bars"| E["Craft the Titanium Sword (-> Titanium Sword)"]
    E --> F["You now have the Titanium Sword"]

%% Center text across cells in Microsoft Excel without merging
flowchart TD
    A["Open Your Excel Worksheet (-> Excel worksheet)"] --> B["Select the Cells (-> range of cells, e.g., A1:B1)"]
    B --> |"selected cells (-> range of cells)"| C["Open the Format Cells Dialog"]
    C --> D["Navigate to the Alignment Tab (-> Alignment tab in Format Cells dialog)"]
    D --> E["Select 'Center Across Selection' in Horizontal; set Vertical alignment"]
    E --> F["Apply the Changes (-> text in first cell appears centered across selected range)"]
    F --> G["Verify the Result (-> text centered; cells remain separate)"]

%% Procedure to become a model in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start With the Right Attributes (high Looks, good Health)"] -->|"high Looks, good Health"| B["Graduate from High School First (age 18+)"]
    B -->|"age 18+, high Looks maintained"| C["Start as a Foot Model or Junior Model (-> Jobs → Special Careers → Actor/Modeling → Foot Model)"]
    C -->|"entry-level modeling experience"| D["Maintain and Increase Your Fame"]
    D -->|"growing Fame, public exposure"| E["Move Into Regular Modeling (Catalog Model / Runway Model)"]
    E -->|"Famous Model status (Fame bar unlocked)"| F["Get an Agent for Elite Gigs (-> Fame menu)"]
    F -->|"agent, elite gigs offers"| G["Attend Auditions"]
    G -->|"successful auditions, higher Fame and income"| H["Keep Your Career Stable"]
    H -->|"sustained performance, rising Fame"| I["Max Out Your Fame"]
    I -->|"full Fame, high income, elite opportunities"| J["Retire Gracefully (pivot to other fame-based careers in BitLife)"]

%% Procedure to enable Secure Boot in BIOS/UEFI for Valorant's Vanguard anti-cheat
flowchart TD
    A["Restart PC and enter BIOS/UEFI"] --> B["Locate the Secure Boot settings"]
    B --> C["Ensure UEFI mode is enabled"]
    C -->|"UEFI boot mode"| D["Enable Secure Boot"]
    D -->|"Secure Boot (Enabled)"| E["Save and exit"]
    E -->|"BIOS/UEFI changes"| F["Verify Secure Boot is on in System Information (-> msinfo32)"]

%% Early-game optimal boss order in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Step 1 – False Knight"] --> B["Step 2 – Gruz Mother"]
    B --> C["Step 3 – Vengefly King"]
    C --> D["Step 4 – Hornet (Protector)"]
    D -->|"Mothwing Cloak (dash)"| E["Step 5 – Massive Moss Charger"]
    E --> F["Step 6 – Mantis Lords"]

%% Procedure to connect a Nintendo Switch to a PC for gameplay capture/streaming
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Equipment: Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter, USB capture card, USB cable, PC"] -->|"Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter"| B["Set Up the Switch Dock"]
    B -->|"HDMI cable from dock HDMI OUT"| C["Connect to the Capture Card"]
    C -->|"HDMI cable to capture card HDMI IN"| D["Connect Capture Card to PC"]
    D -->|"USB connection from capture card to PC"| E["Install Software"]
    E -->|"Capture software with capture card (-> USB capture card) as video source"| F["Start Playing (view/record/stream Nintendo Switch gameplay on PC)"]

%% Escaping through the main door in "Granny" on Extreme difficulty
flowchart TD
    A["Understand the Layout of the House and Item Spawn Locations"] --> B["Gather Tools and Items: Padlock Key, Master Key, Hammer, Pliers, Wrench, Wire Cutters, Wooden Stake, Cogwheels (Red and Blue)"]

    B -->|"Wire Cutters"| C["Disable the Security: Use Wire Cutters to Disable Door Alarm Near the Main Door"]
    C -->|"access to basement wires"| D["Cut the Wires in the Basement to Disable the Electrical Lock"]

    B -->|"Hammer, Pliers"| E["Remove Barricades at the Main Door"]
    E -->|"Hammer"| F["Use Hammer to Remove Wooden Planks from the Main Door"]
    E -->|"Pliers"| G["Use Pliers to Cut Wires in the Basement and Disable the Electrical Lock (-> electrical lock)"]

    B -->|"Padlock Key"| H["Unlock the Padlock at the Main Door"]
    H -->|"unlocked padlock"| I["Unlock the Main Door with the Master Key Once All Security Measures Have Been Dealt With"]
    B -->|"Master Key"| I

    I -->|"unlocked main door"| J["Distract Granny (-> Granny) with Noises to Keep Granny (-> Granny) Away from Your Path"]
    J --> K["Avoid Traps: Bear Traps and Creaking Floors that Can Alert Granny (-> Granny)"]

    K -->|"unlocked main door, Granny (-> Granny) distracted, traps avoided"| L["Final Step: Exit Through the Main Door"]

    %% Additional strategic notes (not strictly sequential)
    M["Use Hiding Spots such as Under Beds and in Wardrobes"] --- J
    N["Remember: On Extreme Mode, Granny (-> Granny) Moves Faster; Be Extra Cautious and Use Sound (Dropping Items) to Distract Granny (-> Granny)"] --- J

%% Procedure to use a Gamertag Generator
flowchart TD
    A["Choose a Gamertag Generator Tool"] -->|"Gamertag Generator Tool"| B["Select Your Preferences"]
    B -->|"Selected Preferences (keywords, style, length, special characters)"| C["Enter Your Information"]
    C -->|"Entered Information (interests, numbers)"| D["Generate Suggestions"]
    D -->|"Generated Gamertag Suggestions"| E["Review and Pick a Favorite"]
    E -->|"Chosen Gamertag"| F["Check Availability"]
    F -->|"Available or tweaked Gamertag"| G["Save or Copy Your Gamertag"]

%% Procedure to disable Quick Chat in Among Us
flowchart TD
    A["Open Among Us"] --> B["Go to the Main Menu"]
    B --> C["Open the Settings"]
    C --> D["Select the 'Data' Tab"]
    D --> E["Find the 'Chat Type' Option"]
    E --> F["Change Chat Type to 'Free or Quick Chat'"]
    F -->|"Free or Quick Chat setting"| G["Confirm Your Age Setting (account age ≥ 13)"]
    G --> H["Save and Exit"]

%% Procedure to play 2-Player Split-Screen Mode in Fortnite
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare Your Setup: PlayStation (PS4/PS5) or Xbox (One/Series X/S), one TV/monitor, two controllers"] --> B["Start Fortnite (-> Fortnite)"]
    B --> C["Sign In Player 1 (-> Player 1’s Epic Games account)"]
    C -->|"Fortnite Lobby screen"| D["Connect Player 2’s Controller"]
    D -->|"second controller with different account"| E["Join Player 1’s Lobby"]
    E -->|"two characters in the Lobby (-> Fortnite Lobby)"| F["Select a Game Mode (Duos or Squads)"]
    F --> G["Start the Match"]
    G -->|"split-screen session"| H["Play Together"]

%% Procedure to defeat Sans on the Genocide route in Undertale
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare Before the Fight"] -->|"Save point, healing items, equipment, mental state"| B["Phase 1: Opening / Early Attacks"]
    B -->|"Attack windows, Karma damage awareness, Gaster Blaster timing"| C["Phase 2: Middle Escalation"]
    C -->|"Higher-speed patterns, Karma accumulation, practiced dodging"| D["Final Sequence / Last Attack"]
    D -->|"Survive long bullet hell, land enough hits"| E["Defeat Sans"]
    E -->|"defeat him (-> Sans)"| F["Post-fight Sequence and Genocide Ending"]

    %% General tips applied throughout phases
    G["General Tips and Tricks: practice in segments, audio cues, minimal movement, smart healing, expect resets"]
    G -. "Practice in segments, minimal movement, smart healing" .-> B
    G -. "Refine patterns, audio cues" .-> C
    G -. "Calmness, pattern memorization" .-> D

    %% Summary of essentials reinforcing whole process
    H["Summary of Essentials: stay still during blue / move during white, learn Gaster Blaster timing, use safe heal windows, memorize patterns, prioritize survival"]
    H -. "Blue/white rule, survival focus" .-> B
    H -. "Pattern memorization, safe heals" .-> C
    H -. "Blue/white timing, survival over aggression" .-> D

%% Procedure to become President in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a Suitable Character (-> BitLife)"] -->|"high Smarts, high Looks, suitable country"| B["Focus on Education"]
    B -->|"high grades, popularity, leadership skills"| C["University Education"]
    C -->|"university degree (e.g., Political Science), extracurriculars"| D["Build a Strong Resume"]
    D -->|"graduate degree (e.g., Law School) or leadership career (Lawyer, Business Executive)"| E["Maintain Good Health and Reputation"]
    E -->|"good health, clean reputation, savings from jobs"| F["Enter Politics"]
    F -->|"local office (e.g., School Board Director, Mayor), campaign funds"| G["Climb the Political Ladder"]
    G -->|"higher offices (e.g., Governor, Congress), political experience, funds, strong reputation, high approval ratings"| H["Run for President"]
    H -->|"successful presidential campaign, elected President"| I["Manage your Presidency"]
    I -->|"failed presidency or lost election, but improved reputation and wealth"| J["Repeat if Necessary"]
    J -->|"stronger reputation, more wealth, more experience"| H

%% Money-making procedure in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Spring Year 1: Focus on Crops (Parsnips, Potatoes, Strawberries)"] -->|"early-game gold from crops"| B["Fishing"]
    B -->|"gold from selling fish"| C["Foraging"]
    C -->|"foraged items, Mixed Seeds"| D["Mining"]
    D -->|"ores and bars from Mines"| E["Animal Products (Coop, Barn, livestock)"]
    E -->|"steady income from eggs, milk, etc."| F["Summer Year 1: Blueberries"]
    F -->|"profit from Blueberries"| G["Fall Year 1: Cranberries"]
    G -->|"profit from Cranberries"| H["Artisan Goods (Mayonnaise, Cheese, Jelly, Wine)"]
    H -->|"high-value Artisan Goods"| I["Winter: Preparation and Foraging"]
    I -->|"upgraded tools, cleared land"| J["Invest in Upgrades and Infrastructure"]
    J -->|"better house, Sheds, Kegs, Preserves Jars"| K["Quests and Special Events"]

%% Procedure to install or repair BattlEye manually
flowchart TD
    A["Ensure Game Compatibility (-> game uses BattlEye)"] -->|"information about game uses BattlEye"| B["Locate the BattlEye Folder in the game directory"]
    B -->|"game directory with BattlEye folder"| C["Find the BattlEye Installer in the BattlEye folder"]
    C -->|"BattlEye installer file (`Install_BattlEye.bat` / `Install_BattlEye.exe`)"| D["Run the BattlEye Installer"]
    D --> E["Follow On-Screen Instructions from the installer"]
    E -->|"installed BattlEye"| F["Verify the Installation by starting the game"]
    F --> G["Update BattlEye (if necessary)"]
    F --> H["Troubleshoot Installation Issues"]
    H --> I["Contact Support (game’s support team or BattlEye support)"]

%% Procedure to become an actor in BitLife without God Mode
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a High Looks Stat (>= 80%)"] -->|"High Looks stat"| B["Focus on Your Appearance"]
    B -->|"Maintained/improved Looks"| C["Participate in Activities (e.g., Drama Club)"]
    C --> D["Graduate High School"]
    D -->|"High school diploma"| E["Apply for a Job as a Voiceover Actor"]
    E -->|"Voiceover Actor job"| F["Work Hard and Get Promoted"]
    F -->|"Higher acting roles (Actor, Lead Actor, Star)"| H["Strive for Lead Roles and Fame"]
    A -->|"High Looks stat"| G["Maintain Your Looks and Health"]
    B -->|"Appearance habits"| G
    F -->|"Ongoing acting career"| G
    G -->|"Good Looks and Health stats"| H

%% Ways to connect a Wii to a Smart TV
flowchart TD
    A["Start: Decide connection method based on TV inputs and available cables"] --> B["AV (Composite) Connection"]
    A --> C["Component Cable Connection"]
    A --> D["HDMI Connection"]
    A --> E["SCART Connection"]
    A --> F["S-Video Connection"]

    %% AV (Composite)
    B --> B1["Identify the AV Cable (-> Wii composite AV cable with yellow video, red/white audio)"]
    B1 -->|"Wii composite AV cable"| B2["Locate AV Inputs on the TV"]
    B2 -->|"Wii composite AV cable"| B3["Connect the Cables (yellow to video, red/white to audio)"]
    B3 -->|"AV connection (-> composite AV input selected)"| B4["Select the AV Input on the TV"]
    B4 -->|"TV on AV input"| B5["Power On the Wii and start playing"]

    %% Component
    C --> C1["Obtain a Wii Component Cable"]
    C1 -->|"Wii Component Cable"| C2["Locate Component Inputs on the TV"]
    C2 -->|"Wii Component Cable"| C3["Connect the red/blue/green video and red/white audio cables"]
    C3 -->|"Component connection (-> component input selected)"| C4["Select the Component Input on the TV"]
    C4 -->|"TV on Component input"| C5["Power On the Wii and adjust Wii settings for component output if needed"]

    %% HDMI
    D --> D1["Purchase a Wii to HDMI Adapter"]
    D1 -->|"Wii to HDMI Adapter"| D2["Connect the Adapter to the Wii (-> AV Multi Out port on the Wii)"]
    D2 -->|"Wii to HDMI Adapter on Wii"| D3["Connect an HDMI Cable between adapter and TV"]
    D3 -->|"HDMI connection (-> HDMI input selected)"| D4["Select the HDMI Input on the TV"]
    D4 -->|"TV on HDMI input"| D5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% SCART
    E --> E1["Get a Wii SCART Adapter"]
    E1 -->|"Wii SCART Adapter"| E2["Plug the AV Cables (-> Wii composite AV cable) into the Adapter"]
    E2 -->|"SCART adapter with AV cables"| E3["Connect the Adapter to the TV (SCART input)"]
    E3 -->|"SCART connection (-> SCART input selected)"| E4["Select the SCART Input on the TV"]
    E4 -->|"TV on SCART input"| E5["Power On the Wii and begin playing"]

    %% S-Video
    F --> F1["Acquire a Wii S-Video Cable"]
    F1 -->|"Wii S-Video Cable"| F2["Locate S-Video and Audio Inputs and connect S-Video + red/white audio"]
    F2 -->|"S-Video connection (-> S-Video input selected)"| F3["Select the S-Video Input on the TV"]
    F3 -->|"TV on S-Video input"| F4["Power On the Wii"]

%% Procedure to play the Sara Sarita game
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: two coins of the same denomination"] -->|"two coins"| B["Choose a Partner (two players)"]
    B --> C["Sit Opposite Each Other"]
    C --> D["Hold the Coins"]
    D -->|"coins"| E["Ask for Permission: 'Sara Sarita, may we join your game?'"]
    E -->|"coins"| F["Toss the Coins"]
    F --> G{"Interpret the Results"}
    G -->|"both coins heads → 'Yes'"| H["Proceed with Questions to Sara Sarita"]
    G -->|"both coins tails → 'No'"| I["Do not proceed with questions"]
    G -->|"one heads, one tails → 'Maybe'"| J["Uncertain permission"]
    H -->|"questions to Sara Sarita + coins"| K["Conclude the Game: ask 'Sara Sarita, may we leave your game?' and toss the coins"]
    I -->|"ask 'Sara Sarita, may we leave your game?' + coins"| K
    J -->|"ask 'Sara Sarita, may we leave your game?' + coins"| K
    K --> L{"Interpret the Results for Leaving"}
    L -->|"both coins heads → 'Yes'"| M["Ending the Game: exit the game"]
    L -->|"both coins tails → 'No'"| K
    L -->|"one heads, one tails → 'Maybe'"| K

%% Procedure to create a powerful deck in Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Card Types (-> Clash Royale): Win Conditions, Support Troops, Defensive Cards, Spells, Cycle Cards, Tanks"] -->|"knowledge of card roles"| B["Choose Your Win Condition"]
    B -->|"chosen win condition card(s)"| C["Add Support and Defensive Cards"]
    C -->|"partially built deck"| D["Include Spells"]
    D -->|"deck with spells"| E["Balance Your Elixir Cost"]
    E -->|"balanced deck draft"| F["Test and Adjust"]
    F -->|"refined deck"| G["Adapt to the Meta"]
    G -->|"meta-adapted deck"| H["Practice and Master Your Deck"]

%% Troubleshooting a flashing blue PlayStation 5 (-> PS5) controller
flowchart TD
    A["Controller is flashing blue (-> DualSense controller)"] --> B["Check the Controller's Battery"]
    B -->|"Charged DualSense controller"| C["Restart the PlayStation 5 (-> PS5) Console"]
    C -->|"Restarted PlayStation 5 (-> PS5) console"| D["Reset the Controller (-> DualSense controller)"]
    D -->|"Reset and re-paired DualSense controller via USB-C cable"| E["Check for Firmware Updates"]
    E -->|"Updated PS5 system software and DualSense controller firmware"| F["Try a Different USB-C Cable"]
    F -->|"Working USB-C cable (if available)"| G["Try Connecting to Another Device"]
    G -->|"Test result: controller vs. console issue identified"| H["Contact PlayStation Support"]

%% Completing the Community Center in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Unlock the Community Center (-> Community Center)"] -->|"access to the Community Center (-> Community Center)"| B["Investigate the Community Center and find the Golden Scroll (-> Golden Scroll) in the Crafts Room"]
    B -->|"quest to visit the Wizard (-> Wizard)"| C["Visit the Wizard (-> Wizard's Tower) to learn Junimo language"]
    C -->|"ability to read the Junimo language and access bundles"| D["Complete Crafts Room Bundles"]
    C --> D1["Complete Pantry Bundles"]
    C --> D2["Complete Fish Tank Bundles"]
    C --> D3["Complete Boiler Room Bundles"]
    C --> D4["Complete Bulletin Board Bundles"]
    C --> D5["Complete Vault (-> Gold payments: 2,500g, 5,000g, 10,000g, 25,000g)"]

    subgraph "Crafts Room Bundles"
        D["Crafts Room: Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter Foraging; Construction; Exotic Foraging Bundles"]
    end

    subgraph "Pantry Bundles"
        D1["Pantry: Spring, Summer, Fall, Quality Crops; Animal; Artisan Bundles"]
    end

    subgraph "Fish Tank Bundles"
        D2["Fish Tank: River, Lake, Ocean, Night Fishing, Crab Pot, Specialty Fish Bundles"]
    end

    subgraph "Boiler Room Bundles"
        D3["Boiler Room: Blacksmith's, Geologist's, Adventurer's Bundles"]
    end

    subgraph "Bulletin Board Bundles"
        D4["Bulletin Board: Chef's, Dye, Field Research, Fodder, Enchanter's Bundles"]
    end

    subgraph "Vault"
        D5["Vault: Pay 2,500g, 5,000g, 10,000g, 25,000g"]
    end

    D -->|"all Crafts Room bundles complete"| E["Restore Crafts Room (part of the Community Center)"]
    D1 -->|"all Pantry bundles complete"| F["Restore Pantry (part of the Community Center)"]
    D2 -->|"all Fish Tank bundles complete"| G["Restore Fish Tank (part of the Community Center)"]
    D3 -->|"all Boiler Room bundles complete"| H["Restore Boiler Room (part of the Community Center)"]
    D4 -->|"all Bulletin Board bundles complete"| I["Restore Bulletin Board (part of the Community Center)"]
    D5 -->|"all Vault payments complete; Bus Repair unlocked"| J["Restore Vault (part of the Community Center)"]

    E --> K["All bundles and rooms restored (-> Community Center fully restored)"]
    F --> K
    G --> K
    H --> K
    I --> K
    J --> K

    K -->|"restored Community Center (-> Community Center) and Junimos' work (-> Junimos)"| L["Pelican Town celebration cutscene and completion of major goal in Stardew Valley"]

%% Basic strategies and tactics to improve gameplay in Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Your Deck (-> Clash Royale deck)"] -->|"knowledge of cards, elixir costs, strengths, weaknesses, synergies"| B["Manage Elixir Efficiently"]

    C --> D["Choose Safe Starting Moves"]
    D -->|"initial low-risk cards and information about opponent"| E["Push and Counter-Push"]

    F --> G["Apply Defensive Strategies"]
    G --> H["Apply Offensive Strategies"]
    H --> I["Watch Your Opponent’s Moves"]
    I -->|"knowledge of opponent’s card cycle and play style"| J["Adjust Your Strategy"]
    J --> K["Plan Endgame Strategy"]
    K --> L["Practice and Learn from Matches"]
    L -->|"insights from replays and top player strategies"| A

%% How to play Codenames
flowchart TD
    A["Form Teams: two teams with a Spymaster and Field Operatives"] --> B["Prepare the Game Board: place 25 codename cards (5x5 layout)"]
    B -->|"25 codename cards (5x5 layout)"| C["Select a Key Card"]
    C -->|"the key card (-> Key Card)"| D["Determine Starting Team"]
    
    D -->|"starting team information (from Key Card)"| E["Spymaster (starting team) Gives Clues"]
    E -->|"one-word clue and number"| F["Field Operatives (starting team) Guess"]
    F -->|"chosen codenames"| G["Reveal Codenames"]
    G --> H["Ending a Turn"]
    H --> I["Switch Turns: other team repeats clue → guess → reveal → end turn"]
    I -->|"repeated turns"| J["Winning / End of Game"]

%% Procedure to escape prison in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Enter Prison (-> BitLife)"] --> B["Access the Escape Mini-Game (-> "Prison" tab → "Escape")"]
    B --> C["Understand the Grid Layout and Objective"]
    C --> D["Plan Your Moves\n(guard moves twice per your move,\nprioritizes horizontal then vertical)"]
    D --> E["Avoid Detection\n(guard tile / your tile overlap)"]
    E --> F["Navigate the Maze\n(use walls to block guard or force loops)"]
    F --> G["Calculate Moves\n(predict guard path several moves ahead)"]
    G --> H["Strategically Use Walls\n(lead guard around obstacles)"]
    H --> I["Gradually Move to Exit\n(approach exit door safely)"]
    I --> J["Execute the Escape\n(run for the exit door)"]
    J --> K["Life After Escape\n(on the run, avoid new crimes / recognition)"]

    %% Tips (supporting, not strictly sequential)
    subgraph Tips_for_Success
        L["Be Patient\n(observe guard’s pattern)"]
        M["Practice\n(play repeatedly to learn guard movement)"]
        N["Use Trial and Error\n(learn from getting caught)"]
        O["Use the Undo Feature\n(if available, rethink last move)"]
    end

    D -. "observation of guard pattern" .-> L
    G -. "repeated attempts" .-> M
    G -. "learning from mistakes" .-> N
    G -. "correcting last move" .-> O

%% Procedure to play "There Is No Game"
flowchart TD
    A["Start the Game (-> There Is No Game) and click around"] --> B["Interact with Title Screen letters"]
    
    %% Breaking the Title
    B --> C["Drop the 'O' from 'NO' by clicking it repeatedly"]
    C -->|"fallen 'O'"| D["Use the fallen 'O' to hit and break other letters"]
    
    %% Unlocking the Next Stage
    D --> E["Reveal and open secret compartment to find the trophy"]
    E -->|"the trophy"| F["Use the trophy to anger the narrator further"]
    
    %% Repairing the Title
    F --> G["Use the trophy to break the narrator's block repairing the title"]
    
    %% Entering a New Game
    G --> H["Reach new scene with goat and locked cage"]
    H --> I["Get the key from the squirrel by trading a nut"]
    
    %% Finding the Nut
    I --> J["Use the trophy to knock down the tree and create a nut"]
    J -->|"the nut"| K["Open the nut by dragging it to a stone or hard surface"]
    
    %% Trading with the Squirrel
    K -->|"cracked nut"| L["Give the cracked nut to the squirrel"]
    L -->|"the key from the squirrel"| M["Use the key to unlock the goat's cage"]
    
    %% Free the Goat
    M --> N["Free the goat and watch the humorous ending sequence"]
    
    %% Conclusion
    N --> O["Listen to final messages from the narrator"]
    O --> P["End of Game: complete 'There Is No Game'"]

%% Set a PS5 as Console Sharing and Offline Play ("primary") and use shared games
flowchart TD
    A["Sign in to the PSN account that owns the games (-> owner account) on the target PS5"] -->|"signed‑in owner account on target PS5"| B["(Optional) Update PS5 to latest system software if needed"]
    B --> C["Open Settings from the PS5 home screen"]
    C --> D["Choose Users and Accounts"]
    D --> E["Select Other"]
    E --> F["Select Console Sharing and Offline Play"]
    F --> G["Choose Enable to set this PS5 for Console Sharing and Offline Play"]

    G -->|"enabled Console Sharing and Offline Play on this PS5"| H["Other users on that PS5 download the owner’s games"]
    H -->|"downloaded & installed games"| I["Other users play the games even if the PS5 is offline"]

    %% Notes / cautions
    J["Note: Only one PS5 can be set for Console Sharing at a time"]
    K["Note: Enabling does not delete the owner account or purchases; it only grants this PS5 access"]
    L["Tip: If the owner (-> owner account) plans to play offline, fully download/install games on this PS5 first"]
    M["Note: If you lose access to the other PS5, use remote deactivation (Sony limits how often)"]
    N["Security tip: Sign in briefly on the other PS5, enable Console Sharing, then sign out; the other person uses their own account"]

    G --- J
    G --- K
    G --- L
    G --- M
    A --- N

%% How to obtain Pale Ore and upgrade the Nail in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD
    A["Start in Hollow Knight"] --> B["Reach Ancient Basin (below City of Tears)"]
    B --> C["Defeat Broken Vessel (boss in Ancient Basin)"]
    C -->|"Pale Ore (Ancient Basin boss reward)"| Z["Upgrade Nail at Nailsmith (City of Tears)"]

    A --> D["Head to Deepnest (from Fungal Wastes / Mantis Village)"]
    D --> E["Go to bottom-right near Beast's Den in Deepnest"]
    E --> F["Find hidden path to small chamber with Pale Ore"]
    F -->|"Pale Ore (Deepnest secret)"| Z

    A --> G["Traverse Crystal Peak (requires Crystal Heart ability)"]
    G --> H["Reach Hallownest’s Crown (top of Crystal Peak)"]
    H --> I["Obtain Pale Ore after tricky platforming"]
    I -->|"Pale Ore (Hallownest’s Crown)"| Z

    A --> J["Rescue 31 grubs across Hallownest"]
    J --> K["Visit Grubfather (northwest Forgotten Crossroads)"]
    K --> L["Receive Pale Ore from Grubfather as reward"]
    L -->|"Pale Ore (Grubfather’s reward)"| Z

    A --> M["Go to Kingdom’s Edge (from City of Tears or Tram)"]
    M --> N["Reach Colosseum of Fools, then go left to Nailmaster Oro’s hut"]
    N --> O["Defeat Nailmaster Oro (boss in Kingdom’s Edge)"]
    O -->|"Pale Ore (Kingdom’s Edge boss reward)"| Z

    A --> P["Collect 300 Essence with the Dream Nail"]
    P --> Q["Visit the Seer (Resting Grounds) with 300 Essence"]
    Q --> R["Receive Pale Ore from the Seer as reward"]
    R -->|"Pale Ore (Seer’s reward)"| Z

    Z --> S["Pay required Geo + Pale Ore to Nailsmith to upgrade your Nail"]

    subgraph Colored_Keys["Colored Keys"]
        direction TB

        %% Blue Key

        H --> I["Enter code 'The Challenge' in Vault of Secrets"]

        N --> O["Receive Green Key"]

        R --> S["Receive Orange Key"]
    end

    %% Extra reminder to use Demon Keys

%% Ways to obtain hardwood in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD

    %% 1. Chopping Large Stumps and Logs
    A["Upgrade Axe to Copper Axe at the Blacksmith"] -->|"Copper Axe"| B["Chop Large Stumps on Farm / in Secret Woods"]
    B -->|"hardwood (from large stumps)"| Z["Collect Hardwood"]

    C["Upgrade Axe to Steel Axe at the Blacksmith"] -->|"Steel Axe"| D["Chop Large Logs on Farm / in Secret Woods"]
    D -->|"hardwood (from large logs)"| Z

    %% 2. Secret Woods
    C -->|"Steel Axe"| E["Remove Log Blocking Path to Secret Woods"]
    E --> F["Visit Secret Woods Daily"]
    F --> G["Chop 6 Large Stumps in Secret Woods"]
    G -->|"12 hardwood per day (from Secret Woods stumps)"| Z

    %% 3. Mahogany Trees
    H["Obtain Mahogany Seeds (from Mahogany Trees, large stumps, large logs, or slimes in the Secret Woods)"] --> I["Plant Mahogany Seeds on Farm"]
    I --> J["(Optional) Use Tree Fertilizer on Mahogany Seeds"]
    J --> K["Wait for Mahogany Trees to Grow"]
    K --> L["Chop Mahogany Trees with Any Axe"]
    L -->|"hardwood (from Mahogany Trees)"| Z

    %% 4. Purchasing from Robin
    M["Visit Robin's Carpenter's Shop"] --> N["Purchase Hardwood (if available)"]
    N -->|"purchased hardwood (from Robin)"| Z

    %% 5. Crates and Barrels in Mines or Skull Cavern
    O["Explore Mines or Skull Cavern"] --> P["Break Crates and Barrels"]
    P -->|"chance of hardwood (from crates and barrels)"| Z

    %% 6. Fishing Treasure Chests
    Q["Fish at Any Location with a Fishing Rod"] --> R["Open Fishing Treasure Chests"]
    R -->|"chance of hardwood (from treasure chests)"| Z

    %% Final collection
    Z["Total Hardwood Collected (for crafting and building upgrades)"]
